title: chamaepeuce abylensis
intro: Chamaepeuce abylensis, also known as Atlas centaury, is a plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. It is native to the Atlas Mountains in Morocco. The Atlas centaury has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and alleviate respiratory issues.
